MT10 - Set point for Temperature Control (*)
MT11 - Second set point for Temperature Control (*)
MH03 - Set point for Temperature Control in Heat mode (*)
MH04 - Second set point for Temperature Control in Heat mode (*)
MT04 - Upper demand limit of unit power (100 = no upper limit)
MT08 - Minimum set point for Temperature Control (*)
MT09 - Maximum set point for Temperature Control (*)
MM03 - Temperature Measuring Unit for visualization (0=°F, 1=°C)
MM04 - Pressure Measuring Unit for visualization (0=PSI, 1=Bar, 2=TEMPERATURE, 3=PSI/TEMP, 4=Bar/TEMP.)
MT12 - Proportional Band for Temp. Control (*)
MT13 - Integral Time for Temperature Control (0 = integral effect disabled)
MT07 - Set point Manager for Temperature Control
MT03 - Demand percentage in Open Loop Control at startup (0 = open loop control disabled).
MT20 - Differential for High Temperature Alarm (*)
MD03 - Set point for discharge pressure for fan control
MD04 - Second Set point for discharge pressure for fan control
MD05 - Prop. Band for Discharge Pressure Control (*)
MD06 - Integral Time for Discharge Pressure Control
MT05 - Maximum demand in emergency mode
MR04 - Value of suction pressure for low SP alarm (*)
MR05 - Delay for suction pressure alarm
MR06 - Value of discharge pressure for high DP alarm.
MR22 - Number of pump down allowed within 1 hour (0 = no pump down allowed)
MR12 - DP value for Adaptive Control (0 = Adaptive control disabled)
MR02 - Number of automatic reset for Discharge pressure alarm or Suction pressure alarm allowed in 90 minutes (0=disabled).
MR03 - Delay time before automatic reset of an alarm allowed in 90 minutes.
MP03 - Rotation time of the pumps in hours
MS11 - Service password to disable SIM NOT READY alarm.
MF12 - Set Dry Cooler temperature in chiller mode (*)
MF13 - Differential Dry Cooler temperature in chiller mode (*)
MM14 - Rotation time for the Units Lead Lag
ME04 - EEV Super Heat set point value (*)
ME11 - EEV set point value for liquid level control if flooded evaporator is selected (*)
ME12 - EEV Proportional Band used for liquid level control
ME13 - EEV Integral Time used for liquid level control
ME16 - EEV preset time after compressor switch on
T21 - Chiller timer counter in days (*)
T22 - CP1 timer counter in days (*)
T23 - CP2 timer counter in days (*)
T24 - CP3 timer counter in days (*)
T25 - CP4 timer counter in days (*)
T26 - CP5 timer counter in days (*)
T27 - CP6 timer counter in days (*)
T28 - CP7 timer counter in days (*)
T29 - CP8 timer counter in days (*)
T30 - Machine energy consumption counter in MWh
T39 - Evaporator PUMP1 timer counter in days (*)
T40 - Evaporator PUMP2 timer counter in days (*)
T42 - Evaporator PUMP3 timer counter in days (*)
T45 - Condenser PUMP1 timer counter in days (*)
T46 - Condenser PUMP2 timer counter in days (*)
MV06 - Nominal Pressure Drop of Evaporators
MV07 - Nominal Flow Rate of Evaporators (in cubic meter for hours)
MN09 - Nominal Pressure Drop of Condenser
MN10 - Nominal Flow Rate of Condenser (in cubic meter for hours)
MP10 - Setpoint for Inverter on Evaporator Pumps control by Evap. Flow Rate

MH01 - Heating mode management: 0= no heating mode; 1= Heat Pump - Air/Water (AW); 2= Heat Pump - Water/Water (WW); 3= Heat Recovery-Water/Water (HR); 4= Heat Recovery-Cooling Priority(HC); 5= Total Heat Recovery (HT); 6= Heat Pump - Air/Air (AA); 7= Multipurpose HRT; 8= Multipurpose 4T.
MP23 - Setpoint used for Inverter on Cond. Pump control by Cond. Flow Rate
MI19 - Set point for Temperature Control in Heat2 mode of multipurpose units (*)
MI20 - Second set point for Temperature Control in Heat2 mode of multipurpose units (*)
MI21 - Proportional Band for Temperature Control in Heat2 mode of multipurpose units (*)
MI22 - Integral Time for Temperature Control in Heat2 mode of multipurpose units (0=integral effect disabled)
MD34 - Fan speed limitation: 0= disabled; 1= enabled by time period; 2= enabled by time period and noise level sensor; 3= enabled by time period and noise level sensor and digital input.
MA01 - Evap System management: 0= Evap System disabled; 1= Evap System with pump; 2= Evap System without pump.
